response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the entire video content. 2. Confirmed the video is exclusively a talk and introduction segment from a VTuber livestream. 3. response.global_summary: This video features an introductory and talk segment from a VTuber livestream (likely a costume reveal/birthday event). There is no vocal music performance in this video segment.

scenes.description: The video starts with a static screen displaying promotional text for a '2026' birthday livestream and new costume reveal. Background music is purely instrumental.
The scene transitions to the stage view where the VTuber is speaking to the audience, introducing the event. No singing occurs.
The scene shifts back to the static promotional screen, ending the segment. No singing occurs.
